steps.title: Identify the contradiction
steps.content: The crucial contrast is marked by “However”—researchers found that lemons (expensive imports, not everyday food) appear three times more frequently than dairy (a major dietary staple).

steps.title: Apply the contradiction
steps.content:
This inverted pattern challenges the assumption that paintings realistically represent eating habits: if they did, common dairy would outweigh rare, luxury lemons.

The matching choice directly names this challenged assumption. The other options either state facts confirmed by the passage (A), reference comparisons not discussed in the passage (B), or suggest an alternative explanation for the pattern rather than identify the assumption being doubted (D).

C is correct.
